description: A crisp puzzle loop with fast restarts and a clean solo challenge.

name: Snake
description: Arcade classic with instant pickup-and-play controls for keyboard devices.

description: The cleanest quick-match game in the set, and the easiest multiplayer starter.

name: Flappy Bird

name: Go Fish

name: Slots

name: Plinko
